title: polygala kalunga
intro: Polygala kalunga, also known as Kalunga or Kalunga de Mar, is a plant species in the family Polygalaceae. It is native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions of Brazil and Peru. The medicinal properties of Polygala kalunga include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health.
